items.name: Fallen Archangel Coat [PBR]
items.description:
🌑Cloaked in Darkness, Bound by Power 🌑
Step into the shadows with the Fallen Archangel Coat—a long, ominous garment that radiates dark elegance. The flowing black-and-red robes combined with massive raven-black wings and demonic horns create a look of both terror and majesty. This is the perfect attire for those who walk the thin line between angel and demon.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Dark, regal coat with flowing textures and layered detail
Massive black wings for an intimidating presence
Demonic horn accents to complete the fallen look
Built with PBR textures for realistic shadows, fabric depth, and shine
🔍 Keywords: fallen angel, dark wings, demon, gothic coat, villain, shadow, Roblox outfit, PBR
⚔️ Embrace the forbidden power and command respect with every step. This model includes high-quality PBR textures.

items.name: ❄️ Frost Knit Coat [PBR]
items.description:
Stay stylish and snug with the Frost Knit Coat — a beautifully detailed winter jacket featuring a soft fur collar and cozy knit patterns inspired by snowy Nordic designs. Perfect for exploring frosty landscapes or sipping cocoa by the fire.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Elegant white and grey knit pattern for a classic winter look 🧊
PBR materials give realistic fabric texture and soft sheen
Great for winter adventures, cozy avatars, or festive outfits
Warm, comfy, and effortlessly stylish for the cold season ❄️
🔍 Keywords: winter, knit, coat, fur, snow, Nordic, cozy, holiday, PBR, Roblox

🍫 Cozy Style Meets Sweet Elegance!
Wrap yourself in warmth and style with this glossy chocolate-brown puffer coat. Its rich, candy-like shine and fluffy padding give off both a luxurious and playful vibe, making it perfect for winter adventures or stylish roleplay.
💡 Why You’ll Love It

Rich chocolate-brown glossy finish 🍫
Cozy padded design for a realistic winter look
